question: I requested a refund but haven’t received it yet. What should I do?
answer: Refunds typically take 5-7 business days to process. If it’s been longer, please contact support with your invoice ID.

question: I see two charges for the same purchase. Why did this happen?
answer: This is often due to a temporary authorization hold. It usually clears within a few days. If not, reach out to support.

question: Where can I download my billing invoice?
answer: You can download all invoices from your account dashboard under the billing or payment history section.

question: My card details have changed. How do I update them?
answer: Go to your account settings and update your payment method under the billing section.

question: Why is my card getting declined even though it works elsewhere?
answer: This can happen due to bank restrictions, expired cards, or insufficient funds. Try another method or contact your bank.

question: When will the next payment be deducted?
answer: Your payment is automatically deducted on your subscription renewal date each billing cycle.

question: If I cancel today, will I still be charged?
answer: No further charges will occur after cancellation, but you will retain access until the end of your current billing period.

question: Do you refund unused days if I cancel mid-month?
answer: We generally do not offer prorated refunds unless required by policy or under special circumstances.

question: I forgot to apply my coupon. Can it be added after payment?
answer: Discount codes usually need to be applied before payment. Contact support to check if an adjustment is possible.

question: Can I pay in INR instead of USD?
answer: Yes, we support multiple currencies based on your region. Pricing will automatically adjust at checkout.

question: Why is my bill higher than expected this month?
answer: Your bill may include taxes, add-ons, or usage beyond your plan limits.

question: How can I upgrade my current plan?
answer: You can upgrade anytime from the subscription section in your account settings.

question: Is it safe to store my card details on your platform?
answer: Yes, we use secure encryption and industry-standard practices to protect your payment information.

question: I was charged by mistake. Can I get my money back?
answer: Please contact support with transaction details. Refund eligibility will be reviewed on a case-by-case basis.

question: How do I turn off automatic renewal?
answer: You can disable auto-renewal from your subscription settings at any time.

question: I canceled my subscription but still got charged. Why?
answer: This usually happens if cancellation was made after the renewal date. Please verify your cancellation timestamp.

question: Do you provide GST-compliant invoices for Indian users?
answer: Yes, GST invoices are available if you add your GST details in the billing section.

question: How can I reach your billing support team?
answer: You can contact billing support via email or through the help section in your account dashboard.

question: Can I switch from monthly to yearly billing?
answer: Yes, you can change your billing cycle anytime from your subscription settings.

question: What happens if my payment fails multiple times?
answer: We retry failed payments automatically. If all retries fail, your account may be temporarily suspended.
